relations: Both the World Cup and the Olympics are international sporting events that create shared experiences and traditions among people worldwide
The World Cup is an example of how sports can unite people from different backgrounds and beliefs in a common passion
The Olympics exemplify the role of sports in creating shared experiences and traditions, and in promoting a sense of belonging and pride among fans
Sports have been a platform for promoting gender equality by including women in male-dominated areas
Sports serve as a platform for athletes to advocate for social justice and inspire change
Sports events have a significant economic impact through revenue generation and job creation
Sports activities contribute to the growth and economic significance of the sports industry
